title: InstructPix2Pix: Learning to Follow Image Editing Instructions
hook: Type a request and watch an AI edit your photo just as you asked.
promise: You will see how InstructPix2Pix makes AI image editing follow your written instructions.
prerequisite_note: You only need a basic sense of how images can be changed and what makes instructions clear.

glossary.plain: A type of AI that creates or edits images by gradually adding and removing noise.
Means the AI is guided by a written command or prompt.
Sets of examples where each image is matched with its edited version and the instruction used.
The step-by-step way random noise is added to an image in a diffusion model.
The process of removing noise to reveal a new or edited image.
The specific change described by the instruction, like make it rainy or add glasses.

cards.title: Edit Images with Words
body: Discover how AI can change images by simply following your written instructions.

cards.title: Imagine asking for any photo edit
body: What if you could just tell a computer, 'Make this cat orange,' and it would paint your wish into reality?
InstructPix2Pix turns this dream into a working tool by teaching AI to understand and follow natural language instructions for editing images.

cards.title: How instructions guide the edit
body: The system starts with an original image and a written edit instruction, like 'add sunglasses.'
A diffusion model combines the image and instruction, applying noise and then removing it in a way that creates the desired edit.
cards.middle: Diffusion model applies and removes noise guided by the instruction
cards.caption: The instruction steers the AI's editing process at every step.

cards.title: Old manual edits vs. AI instruction edits
body: Imagine changing a photo yourself versus just telling AI what to do.
cards.offNote: You need editing skills and time for each change.
cards.onNote: Type your request and the AI handles the edit in seconds.

cards.title: Training AI to listen and edit
body: InstructPix2Pix learns from pairs of images and instructions, so it knows exactly how to change an image when told.
It uses a diffusion model conditioned on the instruction, ensuring that edits match the user's request and look natural.

cards.title: How much should the edit follow the instruction?
body: The AI can make subtle or dramatic changes depending on how strongly it follows your command.
cards.low: The edit is hard to notice, sometimes missing the instruction.
cards.mid: The edit is visible and reasonably close to the request.
cards.high: The edit fully matches the instruction, sometimes at the cost of image realism.

cards.title: What makes InstructPix2Pix work?
body: Select the ingredients that let AI edit images based on instructions.

choices.label: Paired image-instruction data
choices.note: Shows the AI what edits look like for each request.

choices.label: Diffusion model
choices.note: The engine that generates or edits images.

choices.label: Text encoder
choices.note: Turns instructions into something the AI can use.

choices.label: Conditional denoising
choices.note: Lets the AI use the instruction while cleaning up noise.

choices.label: Edit direction learning
choices.note: Trains the AI to know what changes to make.

choices.label: Noise scheduling
choices.note: Controls how much randomness is added or removed in each step.

cards.title: How well does InstructPix2Pix follow instructions?
body: InstructPix2Pix produces edits that are both visually convincing and closely match the user's requests.
It outperforms previous methods in user satisfaction, instruction accuracy, and edit quality.
cards.caption: The model excels at making edits that people actually want.

cards.title: Why this paper matters
body: InstructPix2Pix made image editing accessible to anyone who can type a sentence, not just artists or experts.
It set a new standard for interactive AI tools and inspired further research in controllable image generation.

recap.label: Describe
recap.note: User gives an edit instruction in plain language.

recap.label: Guide
recap.note: AI pairs the instruction with the original image.

recap.label: Edit
recap.note: Diffusion model makes changes step by step.

recap.label: Reveal
recap.note: Output is an image that matches the request.

cards.title: InstructPix2Pix: Learning to Follow Image Editing Instructions
body: Read the original paper for technical details and more examples of instruction-based image editing.
